name: PT Trimitra Propertindo Tbk
summary: PT Trimitra Propertindo Tbk, a property investment and development company, develops residential and commercial projects in Indonesia. The company engages in the construction of buildings, bridges, roads, installations, pipelines, residential areas, housing apartments, and hotel infrastructure. It also acts as a general contractor; and provides property trading and agency services. In addition, the company offers consulting services in the field of architecture, landscape, design and interior, and civil construction, as well as building and apartment engineering and maintenance services. Further, it operates three stars hotel. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in South Tangerang, Indonesia.
